div.div: Ticket details are read-only and cannot be edited after creation.

t.t-value: 'pdf' if 'pdf' in mime else ('img' if mime.startswith('image') else ('doc' if ('word' in mime or 'document' in mime or 'text' in mime) else ('zip' if ('zip' in mime or 'tar' in mime or 'compressed' in mime) else 'other')))

'bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill' if ftype == 'pdf' else ('bi-file-earmark-image-fill' if ftype == 'img' else ('bi-file-earmark-word-fill' if ftype == 'doc' else ('bi-file-zip-fill' if ftype == 'zip' else 'bi-file-earmark-fill')))

t.t-if: ticket.sla_policy_id and ticket.sla_deadline and ticket.state not in ['resolved','closed']

div.t-att-data-duration: ticket.sla_policy_id.response_time * 3600 if ticket.sla_policy_id.time_unit == 'hours' else (ticket.sla_policy_id.response_time * 604800 if ticket.sla_policy_id.time_unit == 'weeks' else ticket.sla_policy_id.response_time * 86400)

div.div: No policy attached to this ticket

t.t-value: 'status' if log.event_type == 'status' else 'assign' if log.event_type == 'assign' else 'sla' if log.event_type == 'sla' else 'created'
'bi-arrow-repeat' if log.event_type == 'status' else 'bi-person-fill' if log.event_type == 'assign' else 'bi-exclamation-triangle-fill' if log.event_type == 'sla' else 'bi-plus-lg'

div.p: No activity recorded yet for this ticket.

textarea.placeholder: Add context for the person receiving this ticket…

div.p: This SOP outlines the standard procedure for triaging frontend-related bugs reported by customers. Steps include: (1) Reproduce the issue in staging, (2) Check browser console for errors, (3) Identify whether CSS, JS, or API is the root cause, (4) Assign severity label, (5) Escalate if P0 or P1.

Best practices for communicating with customers during a ticket lifecycle. Always acknowledge within 1 hour. Use empathetic language. Avoid technical jargon in customer-facing messages. For delays, proactively update the customer with a revised ETA.

Use this template when escalating a ticket to a senior team or management. Subject: [ESCALATION] Ticket #[ID] — [Subject]. Body should include: current status, what has been tried, customer impact level, and urgency.

When an SLA breach is detected: (1) Immediately notify the assigned agent and team lead, (2) Update ticket priority to Urgent, (3) Send a proactive update to the customer, (4) Log breach reason in the internal notes, (5) Conduct a post-mortem within 48 hours.

This checklist is for new support agents joining the team. Covers system access setup, tool walkthroughs, shadowing sessions, and the first 30-day milestone goals. Complete all items within the first week.
Step-by-step guide for debugging common API issues: authentication failures, rate limit errors, malformed requests, and timeout handling. Includes curl examples and error code reference table.

t.t-value: activity.author_id.id == request.env.user.partner_id.id if activity.author_id else False

div.p: No messages yet. Start the conversation below.
Are you sure you want to delete this message? This cannot be undone.
